---
title: "Album Review: Delusion -- Tempers"
draft: true
date: "2026-04-07"
description: "Tempers Great Album"
author: "Michael Woller"
categories: [music, goth]
image: "album.jpg"
---

Tempers with Jasmine Golestaneh just released a new album, that I've been all ears for—am in the middle of ordering the vinyl now.

I've been a big fan of Tempers for a while, and I fell in love with one of the new singles "Who Says" that I've been looking forward to the full album.

Here is my breakdown song by song.

### Sublevel
